snippet: The department recognises its obligations under Occupational Health and Safety (OHS) Act 2004 (Vic) External Link to provide and maintain a safe working environment so far as is reasonably practicable, safe and without risk to health. Under the OHS Act 2004, reference to health includes psychological health.
